name: hydra_scan
description: Attempts to brute-force a single username's password against a live login service using Hydra. Unlike the other Loki tools, this actively attacks real credentials on a live service — it can trigger account lockouts or security alerting — which is why it sits at high risk tier and requires a live target authorization before it will run. v1 is deliberately narrow: one username, one password wordlist, stops at the first hit.

form_fields.name: threads
form_fields.label: Threads (keep low — this is a live credential attack)
